name: Beef Tortilla Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Basic Red Sauce and Southwest Guacamole; set aside.
2. Heat oil in a 10-inch skillet until hot.
3. Cook tortilla strips in oil until light golden brown, about 1 minute; drain.
4. Cook ground beef with chiles and onion until the beef is brown; drain.
5. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
6. Arrange tortilla strips in the bottom of a greased rectangular baking dish measuring 13 X 9 X 2-inches.
7. Top the tortilla strips with the beef mixture, Basic Red Sauce, beans, and cheese.
8. Bake until hot and bubbly, about 25 to 30 minutes.
9. Serve with Southwest Guacamole and Sour Cream.
